id.description: Stable identifier for this fixture. Used in reports.

intent.description: The user-facing prompt to feed into Claude Code.

expected_specialist_slug.description: Slug of the Aztea specialist that SHOULD be invoked. Use 'any' if multiple specialists are equally valid.

failure_bucket_if_wrong.description: Primary failure mode if this prompt does not fire correctly.

notes.description: Human-readable context for the fixture author.

min_runs.description: Number of times to run this fixture to surface flake.
